sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23225" key="daimoniako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαιμονι-ακός</orth>, <sense id="n23225.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δαιμονικός</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">PMag.Osl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.143</biblScope> </bibl> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">-ων-</etym>).</sense> </entryFree>
